page.title: Settings
page.description: Manage your account and journal data

reset.title: Reset journal
reset.description: Delete all your evaluations, funded accounts, payouts and reset history. Your backtests, profile and settings will not be affected.

resetDialog.title: Reset journal data
resetDialog.description: This will permanently delete every evaluation, funded account, payout and reset record tied to your account. Backtests are kept untouched.
